title: memecylon cantleyi
intro: Memecylon cantleyi is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the cantley's memecylon or cantley's melastome. The plant is native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia, where it is traditionally used for its medicinal properties. Memecylon cantleyi is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant's herbal preparations, which include the leaves and bark, are commonly used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and ointments.
